zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Gerard Braybrooke III於1335年出生在英國英格蘭貝德福爾可爾沃斯時，他的父親Gerard de Braybrooke28歲，母親Isabella Dakeney25歲。他於1350年4月與Margaret De Longeville在英國貝德福爾可爾沃斯結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1403年2月10日在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾維可姆享年68歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Gerard Braybrooke III于1335年出生在英国英格兰貝德福爾可爾沃斯时，他的父亲Gerard de Braybrooke28岁，母亲Isabella Dakeney25岁。他于1350年4月与Margaret De Longeville在英国貝德福爾可爾沃斯结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1403年2月10日在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾維可姆享年68岁。

nameMeanings.name: Braybrooke
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

nameMeanings.name: Gerard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. It is derived from gār, gēr ‘spear’ + hard ‘brave, hardy, strong’. In the later Middle Ages this was a more common name than Gerald , with which it was sometimes confused. Nowadays it is less common, surviving mainly among Roman Catholics, in honour of the many saints of this name.

variants.name: Gerrard
meanings: Variant spelling of   Gerard  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

variants.name: Jerrard
meanings: Rare variant spelling of   Gerard  , probably influenced by the form of the modern surname, if not a transferred use.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Gerard Braybrooke III was born in 1335, in Colmworth, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Gerard de Braybrooke, was 28 and his mother, Isabella Dakeney, was 25. He married Margaret De Longeville in April 1350, in Colmworth, Bedfordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died on 10 February 1403, in Wycombe, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 68.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Gerard Braybrooke III est né en 1335, à Colmworth, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Gerard de Braybrooke, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Isabella Dakeney, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Margaret De Longeville en avril 1350, à Colmworth, Bedfordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé le 10 février 1403, à Wycombe, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 68 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Gerard Braybrooke III 1335 in Colmworth, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gerard de Braybrooke 28 und seine Mutter Isabella Dakeney 25. Er hat im April 1350 in Colmworth, Bedfordshire, England Margaret De Longeville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb am 10. Februar 1403 im Alter von 68 Jahren in Wycombe, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Gerard Braybrooke III è nato il nel 1335 nel Colmworth, Bedfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Gerard de Braybrooke, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Isabella Dakeney, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Margaret De Longeville nel aprile 1350, nel Colmworth, Bedfordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì il 10 febbraio 1403, nel Wycombe, Buckinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 68 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Gerard Braybrooke IIIが1335年にイギリスイギリスベドフォードシュアイアコルムウオルスで生まれた時，父Gerard de Braybrookeは28歳，母Isabella Dakeneyは25歳であった。1350年4月にイギリスベドフォードシュアイアコルムウオルスでMargaret De Longevilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1403年2月10日にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアウイコンベで68歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Gerard Braybrooke III(이)가 1335년 영국 잉글랜드 베드퍼드실르 콜워스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gerard de Braybrooke(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabella Dakeney(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1350년 4월 영국 베드퍼드실르 콜워스에서 Margaret De Longeville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1403년 2월 10일 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 윈이코브에서 68세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Gerard Braybrooke III nasceu em 1335, em Colmworth, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Gerard de Braybrooke, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Isabella Dakeney, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret De Longeville em abril de 1350, em Colmworth, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu em 10 de fevereiro de 1403, em Wycombe, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 68 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Gerard Braybrooke III родился в 1335 г. в местности колмворт, бедфордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Gerard de Braybrooke было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabella Dakeney, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret De Longeville апрель 1350 г. в местности колмворт, бедфордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер 10 февраля 1403 г. в местности викомб, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 68 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Gerard Braybrooke III nació en 1335, en Colmworth, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Gerard de Braybrooke, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Isabella Dakeney, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Margaret De Longeville en abril de 1350, en Colmworth, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió el 10 de febrero de 1403, en Wycombe, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 68 años.
